---
title: "Digital cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia in women with chronic migraines"
authors: "Crawford, M., Luik, A., Espie, C., Taylor, H., Burgess, H., Jones, A. L., & Ong, J."
year: 2020
date: 2020-01-01
pub-journal: "Headache: The Journal of Head and Face Pain"
volume: "60(5)"
pages: "902–915"
doi: "10.1111/head.13777"
pdf: "assets/papers/2020/Crawford_etal_2020.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
